You are working on the wordpress-mobile/WordPress-Android repository.
The codebase is at version 23.4 (commit: 1f67fab3).

## Issue to Resolve

Update RELEASE-NOTES
`[***]  Added plan selection, domain selection, and checkout screens in site creation flow (...)`

## Relevant Files

The following files are likely relevant to solving this issue:
- `RELEASE-NOTES.txt`
- `WordPress/src/main/java/org/wordpress/android/ui/sitecreation/SiteCreationMainVM.kt`
- `WordPress/src/main/java/org/wordpress/android/ui/sitecreation/previews/SitePreviewViewModel.kt`
- `WordPress/src/main/java/org/wordpress/android/ui/sitecreation/progress/SiteCreationProgressViewModel.kt`

## Instructions

Please analyze this issue and implement a fix. Make the necessary code changes to resolve the problem described above.

Focus on:
- Understanding the root cause of the issue
- Making minimal, targeted changes to fix the problem
- Ensuring your changes don't break existing functionality

## Important Evaluation Notes

**Your work will be evaluated by running hidden tests that you do not have access to.** These tests will verify that your fix correctly addresses the issue. You should be confident in your solution before finishing.
**If you write tests to verify your changes, create them in NEW test files only** - do NOT modify existing test files

## CRITICAL RESTRICTIONS

**NEVER use git commands.** Do not run `git status`, `git diff`, `git checkout`, `git reset`, or ANY other git commands. Using git will corrupt the evaluation environment and invalidate your entire submission. All file operations should be done through normal file editing and reading tools, not git.

1→package org.wordpress.android.ui.sitecreation
  2→
  3→import android.content.Context
  4→import android.os.Bundle
  5→import android.os.Parcelable
  6→import androidx.annotation.StringRes
  7→import androidx.lifecycle.LiveData
  8→import androidx.lifecycle.MutableLiveData
  9→import androidx.lifecycle.ViewModel
 10→import androidx.lifecycle.map
 11→import androidx.lifecycle.viewModelScope
 12→import dagger.hilt.android.lifecycle.HiltViewModel
 13→import kotlinx.coroutines.Dispatchers
 14→import kotlinx.coroutines.Job
 15→import kotlinx.coroutines.launch
 16→import kotlinx.parcelize.Parcelize
 17→import org.wordpress.android.R
 18→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.Dispatcher
 19→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.model.SiteModel
 20→import org.wordpress.android.networking.MShot
 21→import org.wordpress.android.ui.domains.DomainRegistrationCheckoutWebViewActivity.OpenCheckout.CheckoutDetails
 22→import org.wordpress.android.ui.domains.DomainRegistrationCompletedEvent
 23→import org.wordpress.android.ui.domains.DomainsRegistrationTracker
 24→import org.wordpress.android.ui.jetpackoverlay.JetpackFeatureRemovalOverlayUtil
 25→import org.wordpress.android.ui.sitecreation.SiteCreationMainVM.SiteCreationScreenTitle.ScreenTitleEmpty
 26→import org.wordpress.android.ui.sitecreation.SiteCreationMainVM.SiteCreationScreenTitle.ScreenTitleGeneral
 27→import org.wordpress.android.ui.sitecreation.SiteCreationMainVM.SiteCreationScreenTitle.ScreenTitleStepCount
 28→import org.wordpress.android.ui.sitecreation.SiteCreationResult.Completed
 29→import org.wordpress.android.ui.sitecreation.SiteCreationResult.Created
 30→import org.wordpress.android.ui.sitecreation.SiteCreationResult.CreatedButNotFetched
 31→import org.wordpress.android.ui.sitecreation.SiteCreationResult.NotCreated
 32→import org.wordpress.android.ui.sitecreation.domains.DomainModel
 33→import org.wordpress.android.ui.sitecreation.misc.SiteCreationSource
 34→import org.wordpress.android.ui.sitecreation.misc.SiteCreationTracker
 35→import org.wordpress.android.ui.sitecreation.plans.PlanModel
 36→import org.wordpress.android.ui.sitecreation.usecases.FetchHomePageLayoutsUseCase
 37→import org.wordpress.android.ui.utils.UiString.UiStringRes
 38→import org.wordpress.android.util.AppLog
 39→import org.wordpress.android.util.AppLog.T
 40→import org.wordpress.android.util.NetworkUtilsWrapper
 41→import org.wordpress.android.util.extensions.getParcelableCompat
 42→import org.wordpress.android.util.image.ImageManager
 43→import org.wordpress.android.util.wizard.WizardManager
 44→import org.wordpress.android.util.wizard.WizardNavigationTarget
 45→import org.wordpress.android.util.wizard.WizardState
 46→import org.wordpress.android.viewmodel.Event
 47→import org.wordpress.android.viewmodel.SingleEventObservable
 48→import org.wordpress.android.viewmodel.SingleLiveEvent
 49→import org.wordpress.android.viewmodel.helpers.DialogHolder
 50→import javax.inject.Inject
 51→
 52→const val TAG_WARNING_DIALOG = "back_pressed_warning_dialog"
 53→const val KEY_CURRENT_STEP = "key_current_step"
 54→const val KEY_SITE_CREATION_STATE = "key_site_creation_state"
 55→
 56→@Parcelize
 57→data class SiteCreationState(
 58→    val siteIntent: String? = null,
 59→    val siteName: String? = null,
 60→    val segmentId: Long? = null,
 61→    val siteDesign: String? = null,
 62→    val domain: DomainModel? = null,
 63→    val plan: PlanModel? = null,
 64→    val result: SiteCreationResult = NotCreated,
 65→) : WizardState, Parcelable
 66→
 67→typealias NavigationTarget = WizardNavigationTarget<SiteCreationStep, SiteCreationState>
 68→
 69→sealed interface SiteCreationResult : Parcelable {
 70→    @Parcelize
 71→    object NotCreated : SiteCreationResult
 72→
 73→    sealed interface Created: SiteCreationResult {
 74→        val site: SiteModel
 75→    }
 76→
 77→    sealed interface CreatedButNotFetched : Created {
 78→        @Parcelize
 79→        data class NotInLocalDb(
 80→            override val site: SiteModel,
 81→        ) : CreatedButNotFetched
 82→
 83→        @Parcelize
 84→        data class InCart(
 85→            override val site: SiteModel,
 86→        ) : CreatedButNotFetched
 87→
 88→        @Parcelize
 89→        data class DomainRegistrationPurchased(
 90→            val domainName: String,
 91→            val email: String,
 92→            override val site: SiteModel,
 93→        ) : CreatedButNotFetched
 94→    }
 95→
 96→    @Parcelize
 97→    data class Completed(
 98→        override val site: SiteModel,
 99→    ) : Created
100→}
101→
102→typealias SiteCreationCompletionEvent = Pair<SiteCreationResult, Boolean>
103→
104→@HiltViewModel
105→class SiteCreationMainVM @Inject constructor(
106→    private val tracker: SiteCreationTracker,
107→    private val wizardManager: WizardManager<SiteCreationStep>,
108→    private val networkUtils: NetworkUtilsWrapper,
109→    private val dispatcher: Dispatcher,
110→    private val fetchHomePageLayoutsUseCase: FetchHomePageLayoutsUseCase,
111→    private val imageManager: ImageManager,
112→    private val jetpackFeatureRemovalOverlayUtil: JetpackFeatureRemovalOverlayUtil,
113→    private val domainsRegistrationTracker: DomainsRegistrationTracker,
114→) : ViewModel() {
115→    init {
116→        dispatcher.register(fetchHomePageLayoutsUseCase)
117→    }
118→
119→    override fun onCleared() {
120→        super.onCleared()
121→        dispatcher.unregister(fetchHomePageLayoutsUseCase)
122→    }
123→
124→    var siteCreationDisabled: Boolean = false
125→    private var isStarted = false
126→
127→    private lateinit var siteCreationState: SiteCreationState
128→
129→    internal var preloadingJob: Job? = null
130→
131→    val navigationTargetObservable: SingleEventObservable<NavigationTarget> by lazy {
132→        SingleEventObservable(
133→            wizardManager.navigatorLiveData.map {
134→                clearOldSiteCreationState(it)
135→                WizardNavigationTarget(it, siteCreationState)
136→            }
137→        )
138→    }
139→
140→    private val _dialogAction = SingleLiveEvent<DialogHolder>()
141→    val dialogActionObservable: LiveData<DialogHolder> = _dialogAction
142→
143→    private val _onCompleted = SingleLiveEvent<SiteCreationCompletionEvent>()
144→    val onCompleted: LiveData<SiteCreationCompletionEvent> = _onCompleted
145→
146→    private val _exitFlowObservable = SingleLiveEvent<Unit?>()
147→    val exitFlowObservable: LiveData<Unit?> = _exitFlowObservable
148→
149→    private val _onBackPressedObservable = SingleLiveEvent<Unit?>()
150→    val onBackPressedObservable: LiveData<Unit?> = _onBackPressedObservable
151→
152→    private val _showJetpackOverlay = MutableLiveData<Event<Boolean>>()
153→    val showJetpackOverlay: LiveData<Event<Boolean>> = _showJetpackOverlay
154→
155→    private val _showDomainCheckout = SingleLiveEvent<CheckoutDetails>()
156→    val showDomainCheckout: LiveData<CheckoutDetails> = _showDomainCheckout
157→
158→    fun start(savedInstanceState: Bundle?, siteCreationSource: SiteCreationSource) {
159→        if (isStarted) return
160→        if (savedInstanceState == null) {
161→            tracker.trackSiteCreationAccessed(siteCreationSource)
162→            siteCreationState = SiteCreationState()
163→            if (jetpackFeatureRemovalOverlayUtil.shouldShowSiteCreationOverlay())
164→                showJetpackOverlay()
165→            if (jetpackFeatureRemovalOverlayUtil.shouldDisableSiteCreation())
166→                siteCreationDisabled = true
167→            else
168→                showSiteCreationNextStep()
169→        } else {
170→            siteCreationState = requireNotNull(savedInstanceState.getParcelableCompat(KEY_SITE_CREATION_STATE))
171→            val currentStepIndex = savedInstanceState.getInt(KEY_CURRENT_STEP)
172→            wizardManager.setCurrentStepIndex(currentStepIndex)
173→        }
174→        isStarted = true
175→    }
176→
177→    private fun showSiteCreationNextStep() {
178→        wizardManager.showNextStep()
179→    }
180→
181→    private fun showJetpackOverlay() {
182→        _showJetpackOverlay.value = Event(true)
183→    }
184→
185→    fun preloadThumbnails(context: Context) {
186→        if (preloadingJob == null) {
187→            preloadingJob = viewModelScope.launch(Dispatchers.IO) {
188→                if (networkUtils.isNetworkAvailable()) {
189→                    val response = fetchHomePageLayoutsUseCase.fetchStarterDesigns()
190→
191→                    // Else clause added to better understand the reason that causes this crash:
192→                    // https://github.com/wordpress-mobile/WordPress-Android/issues/17020
193→                    if (response.isError) {
194→                        AppLog.e(T.THEMES, "Error preloading starter designs: ${response.error}")
195→                        return@launch
196→                    } else if (response.designs == null) {
197→                        AppLog.e(T.THEMES, "Null starter designs response: $response")
198→                        return@launch
199→                    }
200→
201→                    for (design in response.designs) {
202→                        imageManager.preload(context, MShot(design.previewMobile))
203→                    }
204→                }
205→                preloadingJob = null
206→            }
207→        }
208→    }
209→
210→    fun writeToBundle(outState: Bundle) {
211→        outState.putInt(KEY_CURRENT_STEP, wizardManager.currentStep)
212→        outState.putParcelable(KEY_SITE_CREATION_STATE, siteCreationState)
213→    }
214→
215→    fun onSiteIntentSelected(intent: String?) {
216→        siteCreationState = siteCreationState.copy(siteIntent = intent)
217→        wizardManager.showNextStep()
218→    }
219→
220→    fun onSiteIntentSkipped() {
221→        siteCreationState = siteCreationState.copy(siteIntent = null)
222→        wizardManager.showNextStep()
223→    }
224→
225→    fun onSiteNameSkipped() {
226→        siteCreationState = siteCreationState.copy(siteName = null)
227→        wizardManager.showNextStep()
228→    }
229→
230→    fun onSiteNameEntered(siteName: String) {
231→        siteCreationState = siteCreationState.copy(siteName = siteName)
232→        wizardManager.showNextStep()
233→    }
234→
235→    fun onDesignSelected(siteDesign: String) {
236→        siteCreationState = siteCreationState.copy(siteDesign = siteDesign)
237→        wizardManager.showNextStep()
238→    }
239→
240→    fun onBackPressed() {
241→        return if (wizardManager.isLastStep()) {
242→            if (siteCreationState.result is Completed) {
243→                exitFlow(false)
244→            } else {
245→                _dialogAction.value = DialogHolder(
246→                    tag = TAG_WARNING_DIALOG,
247→                    title = null,
248→                    message = UiStringRes(R.string.new_site_creation_preview_back_pressed_warning),
249→                    positiveButton = UiStringRes(R.string.exit),
250→                    negativeButton = UiStringRes(R.string.cancel)
251→                )
252→            }
253→        } else {
254→            wizardManager.onBackPressed()
255→            _onBackPressedObservable.call()
256→        }
257→    }
258→
259→    private fun clearOldSiteCreationState(wizardStep: SiteCreationStep) {
260→        if (wizardStep == SiteCreationStep.DOMAINS) {
261→            siteCreationState.domain?.let {
262→                siteCreationState = siteCreationState.copy(domain = null)
263→            }
264→        }
265→        if (wizardStep == SiteCreationStep.PLANS) {
266→            siteCreationState.plan?.let {
267→                siteCreationState = siteCreationState.copy(plan = null)
268→            }
269→        }
270→    }
271→
272→    fun onDomainsScreenFinished(domain: DomainModel) {
273→        siteCreationState = siteCreationState.copy(domain = domain)
274→        wizardManager.showNextStep()
275→    }
276→
277→    fun onPlanSelection(plan: PlanModel) {
278→        siteCreationState = siteCreationState.copy(plan = plan)
279→        if (plan.productSlug == "free_plan") {
280→            // if they select a paid domain, then choose a free plan, with free domain on plan selection screen
281→            siteCreationState = siteCreationState.copy(
282→                domain = DomainModel(
283→                    domainName = plan.productName.orEmpty(),
284→                    isFree = true,
285→                    cost = "",
286→                    productId = 0,
287→                    supportsPrivacy = false
288→                )
289→            )
290→        }
291→        wizardManager.showNextStep()
292→    }
293→
294→    fun screenTitleForWizardStep(step: SiteCreationStep): SiteCreationScreenTitle {
295→        val stepPosition = wizardManager.stepPosition(step)
296→        val stepCount = wizardManager.stepsCount
297→        val firstStep = stepPosition == 1
298→        val lastStep = stepPosition == stepCount
299→        val singleInBetweenStepDomains = step.name == SiteCreationStep.DOMAINS.name
300→
301→        return when {
302→            firstStep -> ScreenTitleGeneral(R.string.new_site_creation_screen_title_general)
303→            lastStep -> ScreenTitleEmpty
304→            singleInBetweenStepDomains -> ScreenTitleGeneral(R.string.new_site_creation_domain_header_title)
305→            else -> ScreenTitleStepCount(
306→                R.string.new_site_creation_screen_title_step_count,
307→                stepCount - 2, // -2 -> first = general title (Create Site), last item = empty title
308→                stepPosition - 1 // -1 -> first item has general title - Create Site
309→            )
310→        }
311→    }
312→
313→    fun onCartCreated(checkoutDetails: CheckoutDetails) {
314→        siteCreationState = siteCreationState.copy(result = CreatedButNotFetched.InCart(checkoutDetails.site))
315→        domainsRegistrationTracker.trackDomainsPurchaseWebviewViewed(checkoutDetails.site, isSiteCreation = true)
316→        _showDomainCheckout.value = checkoutDetails
317→    }
318→
319→    fun onCheckoutResult(event: DomainRegistrationCompletedEvent?) {
320→        if (event == null) return onBackPressed()
321→        domainsRegistrationTracker.trackDomainsPurchaseDomainSuccess(isSiteCreation = true)
322→        siteCreationState = siteCreationState.run {
323→            check(result is CreatedButNotFetched.InCart)
324→            copy(
325→                result = CreatedButNotFetched.DomainRegistrationPurchased(
326→                    event.domainName,
327→                    event.email,
328→                    result.site,
329→                )
330→            )
331→        }
332→        wizardManager.showNextStep()
333→    }
334→
335→    fun onFreeSiteCreated(site: SiteModel) {
336→        siteCreationState = siteCreationState.copy(result = CreatedButNotFetched.NotInLocalDb(site))
337→        if (checkNotNull(siteCreationState.domain).isFree) {
338→            wizardManager.showNextStep()
339→        }
340→    }
341→
342→    fun onWizardCancelled() {
343→        _onCompleted.value = NotCreated to isSiteTitleTaskCompleted()
344→    }
345→
346→    fun onWizardFinished(result: Created) {
347→        siteCreationState = siteCreationState.copy(result = result)
348→        _onCompleted.value = result to isSiteTitleTaskCompleted()
349→    }
350→
351→    private fun isSiteTitleTaskCompleted() = !siteCreationState.siteName.isNullOrBlank()
352→
353→    /**
354→     * Exits the flow and tracks an event when the user force-exits the "site creation in progress" before it completes.
355→     */
356→    private fun exitFlow(forceExit: Boolean) {
357→        if (forceExit) {
358→            tracker.trackFlowExited()
359→        }
360→        _exitFlowObservable.call()
361→    }
362→
363→    fun onPositiveDialogButtonClicked(instanceTag: String) {
364→        check(instanceTag == TAG_WARNING_DIALOG) { "Unknown dialog tag: $instanceTag" }
365→        exitFlow(true)
366→    }
367→
368→    fun onNegativeDialogButtonClicked(instanceTag: String) {
369→        check(instanceTag == TAG_WARNING_DIALOG) { "Unknown dialog tag: $instanceTag" }
370→        // do nothing
371→    }
372→
373→    sealed class SiteCreationScreenTitle {
374→        data class ScreenTitleStepCount(@StringRes val resId: Int, val stepsCount: Int, val stepPosition: Int) :
375→            SiteCreationScreenTitle()
376→
377→        data class ScreenTitleGeneral(@StringRes val resId: Int) :
378→            SiteCreationScreenTitle()
379→
380→        object ScreenTitleEmpty : SiteCreationScreenTitle() {
381→            const val screenTitle = ""
382→        }
383→    }
384→}
385→

conversation_history.content:
1→package org.wordpress.android.ui.sitecreation
 2→
 3→import org.wordpress.android.ui.sitecreation.SiteCreationStep.DOMAINS
 4→import org.wordpress.android.ui.sitecreation.SiteCreationStep.INTENTS
 5→import org.wordpress.android.ui.sitecreation.SiteCreationStep.PLANS
 6→import org.wordpress.android.ui.sitecreation.SiteCreationStep.PROGRESS
 7→import org.wordpress.android.ui.sitecreation.SiteCreationStep.SITE_DESIGNS
 8→import org.wordpress.android.ui.sitecreation.SiteCreationStep.SITE_NAME
 9→import org.wordpress.android.ui.sitecreation.SiteCreationStep.SITE_PREVIEW
10→import org.wordpress.android.util.config.PlansInSiteCreationFeatureConfig
11→import org.wordpress.android.util.config.SiteIntentQuestionFeatureConfig
12→import org.wordpress.android.util.config.SiteNameFeatureConfig
13→import org.wordpress.android.util.wizard.WizardStep
14→import javax.inject.Inject
15→import javax.inject.Singleton
16→
17→enum class SiteCreationStep : WizardStep {
18→    SITE_DESIGNS, DOMAINS, PLANS, PROGRESS, SITE_PREVIEW, INTENTS, SITE_NAME;
19→}
20→
21→@Singleton
22→class SiteCreationStepsProvider @Inject constructor(
23→    private val siteIntentQuestionFeatureConfig: SiteIntentQuestionFeatureConfig,
24→    private val siteNameFeatureConfig: SiteNameFeatureConfig,
25→    private val plansInSiteCreationFeatureConfig: PlansInSiteCreationFeatureConfig
26→) {
27→    private val isSiteNameEnabled get() = siteNameFeatureConfig.isEnabled()
28→    private val isIntentsEnabled get() = siteIntentQuestionFeatureConfig.isEnabled()
29→    private val isPlansEnabled get() = plansInSiteCreationFeatureConfig.isEnabled()
30→
31→    fun getSteps(): List<SiteCreationStep> = when {
32→        isPlansEnabled -> listOf(INTENTS, SITE_DESIGNS, DOMAINS, PLANS, PROGRESS, SITE_PREVIEW)
33→        isSiteNameEnabled -> listOf(INTENTS, SITE_NAME, SITE_DESIGNS, PROGRESS, SITE_PREVIEW)
34→        isIntentsEnabled -> listOf(INTENTS, SITE_DESIGNS, DOMAINS, PROGRESS, SITE_PREVIEW)
35→        else -> listOf(SITE_DESIGNS, DOMAINS, PROGRESS, SITE_PREVIEW)
36→    }
37→}

179→        targetCompatibility JavaVersion.VERSION_1_8
180→    }
181→
182→    flavorDimensions "app", "buildType"
183→
184→    productFlavors {
185→        wordpress {
186→            isDefault true
187→            dimension "app"
188→
189→            applicationId "org.wordpress.android"
190→            buildConfigField "boolean", "IS_JETPACK_APP", "false"
191→            buildConfigField "String", "TRACKS_EVENT_PREFIX", '"wpandroid_"'
192→            buildConfigField "String", "PUSH_NOTIFICATIONS_APP_KEY", '"org.wordpress.android"'
193→            buildConfigField "boolean", "ENABLE_QRCODE_AUTH_FLOW", "false"
194→            buildConfigField "boolean", "ENABLE_OPEN_WEB_LINKS_WITH_JP_FLOW", "true"
195→
196→            manifestPlaceholders = [magicLinkScheme:"wordpress"]
197→        }
198→
199→        jetpack {
200→            dimension "app"
201→
202→            applicationId "com.jetpack.android"
203→            buildConfigField "boolean", "IS_JETPACK_APP", "true"
204→            buildConfigField "boolean", "ENABLE_SITE_CREATION", "true"
205→            buildConfigField "boolean", "ENABLE_ADD_SELF_HOSTED_SITE", "true"
206→            buildConfigField "boolean", "ENABLE_SIGNUP", "true"
207→            buildConfigField "boolean", "ENABLE_READER", "true"
208→            buildConfigField "boolean", "ENABLE_CREATE_FAB", "true"
209→            buildConfigField "boolean", "ENABLE_FOLLOWED_SITES_SETTINGS", "true"
210→            buildConfigField "boolean", "ENABLE_WHATS_NEW_FEATURE", "true"
211→            buildConfigField "String", "TRACKS_EVENT_PREFIX", '"jpandroid_"'
212→            buildConfigField "String", "PUSH_NOTIFICATIONS_APP_KEY", '"com.jetpack.android"'
213→            buildConfigField "boolean", "ENABLE_QRCODE_AUTH_FLOW", "true"
214→            buildConfigField "boolean", "ENABLE_OPEN_WEB_LINKS_WITH_JP_FLOW", "false"
215→
216→            manifestPlaceholders = [magicLinkScheme:"jetpack"]
217→
218→            // Limit string resources to Mag16 only for Jetpack
219→            // Note 1: this only affects included _locales_; variants for `values-night`, `values-land` and other configs are _still_ preserved in Jetpack and not filtered by this.
220→            resourceConfigurations = ["ar", "de", "es", "fr", "he", "id", "it", "ja", "ko", "nl", "pt-rBR", "ru", "sv", "tr", "zh-rCN", "zh-rTW"]
221→            // Note 2: `in` is the legacy locale code for `id` and `iw` is the legacy locale code for `he`.
222→            // We need to include those to make sure users with older Android versions and still using those legacy codes still have those translations show up at runtime.
223→            resourceConfigurations += ["in", "iw"]
224→        }
225→
226→        // Used for release/beta testing builds. Usually shouldn't be build locally.
227→        // AppName: WordPress/Jetpack
228→        vanilla {
229→            dimension "buildType"
230→
231→            buildConfigField "boolean", "ME_ACTIVITY_AVAILABLE", "false"
232→            buildConfigField "long", "REMOTE_CONFIG_FETCH_INTERVAL", "3600"
233→            buildConfigField "boolean", "ENABLE_DEBUG_SETTINGS", "false"
234→        }
235→
236→        // Used for local development - preferred variant for developers.
237→        // AppName: WordPress Beta/Jetpack Beta
238→        wasabi {
239→            applicationIdSuffix ".beta"
240→            dimension "buildType"
241→        }
242→
243→        // Used for CI builds on PRs (aka "Prototype Builds"). Can be used locally when a developer needs to install multiple versions of the app on the same device.
244→        // AppName: WordPress Pre-Alpha/Jetpack Pre-Alpha
245→        jalapeno {
246→            isDefault true
247→            applicationIdSuffix ".prealpha"
248→            dimension "buildType"
249→        }
250→
251→        // Also dynamically add additional `buildConfigFields` to our app flavors from any `wp.`/`jp.`-prefixed property in `gradle.properties`
252→        def properties = loadPropertiesFromFile(checkGradlePropertiesFile())
253→        addBuildConfigFieldsFromPrefixedProperties(wordpress, properties, ['wp'])
254→        addBuildConfigFieldsFromPrefixedProperties(jetpack, properties, ['wp', 'jp']) // Inherit same properties used from WP first then overwrite with JP-specific ones
255→    }
256→
257→    buildTypes {
258→        release {
259→            // Proguard is used to shrink our apk, and reduce the number of methods in our final apk,
260→            // but we don't obfuscate the bytecode.
261→            minifyEnabled true
262→            proguardFiles getDefaultProguardFile('proguard-android.txt'), 'proguard.cfg'
263→        }
264→
265→        debug {
266→            minifyEnabled false
267→            buildConfigField "String", "APP_PN_KEY", "\"org.wordpress.android.debug.build\""
268→            pseudoLocalesEnabled true
269→        }
270→    }
271→
272→    testOptions {
273→        animationsDisabled = true
274→        unitTests {
275→            includeAndroidResources = true
276→            returnDefaultValues = true
277→        }
278→    }
279→
280→    lint {
281→        warningsAsErrors = true
282→        checkDependencies = true
283→        checkGeneratedSources = true
284→        lintConfig file("${project.rootDir}/config/lint/lint.xml")
285→        baseline file("${project.rootDir}/config/lint/baseline.xml")
286→        enable += 'UnknownNullness'
287→    }
288→
289→    packagingOptions {
290→        // MPAndroidChart uses androidX - remove this line when we migrate everything to androidX
291→        exclude 'META-INF/proguard/androidx-annotations.pro'
292→
293→        // Exclude React Native's JSC and Fabric JNI
294→        exclude '**/libjscexecutor.so'
295→        exclude '**/libfabricjni.so'
296→
297→        // Avoid React Native's JNI duplicated classes
298→        pickFirst '**/libc++_shared.so'
299→        pickFirst '**/libfbjni.so'
300→
301→        pickFirst 'META-INF/-no-jdk.kotlin_module'
302→
303→    }
304→
305→    bundle {
306→        language {
307→            // Don't split language resources for App Bundles.
308→            // This is required to switch language in app.
309→            enableSplit = false
310→        }
311→    }
312→
313→    buildFeatures {
314→        buildConfig true
315→        viewBinding true
316→        compose true
317→
318→        composeOptions {
319→            kotlinCompilerExtensionVersion = androidxComposeCompilerVersion
320→        }
321→    }
322→}

324→/// Dynamically add `buildConfigFields` on a given variant/flavor from prefixed properties
325→/// (This is used to e.g. add every property prefixed `wp.` in `gradle.properties` as a BuildConfigField in the `wordpress` flavor)
326→///
327→/// `prefixes` is an array of prefixes to search for, without their `.` dot (e.g. `["wp", "jp"]`).
328→/// Properties found with prefixes first in that array will be overridden by the ones found with prefixes later in the array.
329→static def addBuildConfigFieldsFromPrefixedProperties(variant, properties, prefixes) {
330→    // Build a Map of prefixed properties found. Keys in this Map will be lowercased and `.` replaced by `_`
331→    def fields_map = [:]
332→    prefixes.each { prefix ->
333→        properties.each { property ->
334→            if (property.key.toLowerCase().startsWith("${prefix.toLowerCase()}.")) {
335→                def key = property.key.toLowerCase().replace("${prefix.toLowerCase()}.", "").replace(".", "_")
336→                fields_map[key] = property.value
337→            }
338→        }
339→    }
340→
341→    // Then define the found properties as buildConfigFields
342→    fields_map.each {
343→        variant.buildConfigField "String", it.key.toUpperCase(), "\"${it.value}\""
344→    }
345→}

600→tasks.register("violationCommentsToGitHub", ViolationCommentsToGitHubTask) {
601→    repositoryOwner = "wordpress-mobile"
602→    repositoryName = "WordPress-Android"
603→    pullRequestId = System.properties['GITHUB_PULLREQUESTID']
604→    username = System.properties['GITHUB_USERNAME']
605→    password = System.properties['GITHUB_PASSWORD']
606→    oAuth2Token = System.properties['GITHUB_OAUTH2TOKEN']
607→    gitHubUrl = "https://api.github.com/"
608→    createCommentWithAllSingleFileComments = false
609→    createSingleFileComments = true
610→    commentOnlyChangedContent = true
611→    minSeverity = SEVERITY.INFO //ERROR, INFO, WARN
612→    commentTemplate = """
613→**Reporter**: {{violation.reporter}}{{#violation.rule}}\n
614→**Rule**: {{violation.rule}}{{/violation.rule}}
615→**Severity**: {{violation.severity}}
616→**File**: {{violation.file}}:{{violation.startLine}}{{#violation.source}}
617→**Source**: {{violation.source}}{{/violation.source}}
618→{{violation.message}}
619→"""
620→    violations = [
621→            ["CHECKSTYLE", ".", ".*/build/.*/checkstyle/.*\\.xml\$", "CheckStyle"],
622→            ["CHECKSTYLE", ".", ".*/build/.*/detekt/.*\\.xml\$", "Detekt"]
623→    ]
624→}

627→    repositoryOwner = "wordpress-mobile"
628→    repositoryName = "WordPress-Android"
629→    pullRequestId = System.properties['GITHUB_PULLREQUESTID']
630→    oAuth2Token = System.properties['GITHUB_OAUTH2TOKEN']
631→    gitHubUrl = "https://api.github.com/"
632→    createCommentWithAllSingleFileComments = true
633→    createSingleFileComments = false
634→    commentOnlyChangedContent = true
635→    commentOnlyChangedFiles = false
636→    minSeverity = SEVERITY.INFO
637→    commentTemplate = """
638→<details><summary>The PR caused some dependency changes (expand to see details)</summary>
639→<p>
640→
641→```diff
642→{{{violation.message}}}
643→```
644→
645→</p>
646→</details>
647→
648→*Please review and act accordingly*
649→"""
650→    violations = [
651→            ["GENERIC", ".", ".*/build/.*/diff/.*\\.txt\$", "DependenciesDiffChecker"],
652→    ]

675→        }

677→}
678→
679→def checkGradlePropertiesFile() {
680→    def inputFile = file("${rootDir}/gradle.properties")
681→    if (!inputFile.exists()) {
682→        throw new StopActionException("Build configuration file gradle.properties doesn't exist, follow README instructions")
683→    }
684→    return inputFile
685→}
686→
687→static def loadPropertiesFromFile(inputFile) {
688→    def properties = new Properties()
689→    inputFile.withInputStream { stream ->
690→        properties.load(stream)
691→    }
692→    return properties
693→}
694→
695→// For app signing
696→if (["uploadStoreFile", "uploadStorePassword", "uploadKeyAlias", "uploadKeyPassword"].count { !project.hasProperty(it) } == 0) {
697→    android {
698→        signingConfigs {
699→            release {
700→                storeFile = rootProject.file(project.uploadStoreFile)
701→                storePassword = project.uploadStorePassword
702→                keyAlias = project.uploadKeyAlias
703→                keyPassword = project.uploadKeyPassword
704→            }
705→        }
706→    }
707→    android.buildTypes.release.signingConfig = android.signingConfigs.release
708→}
709→
710→if (project.hasProperty("debugStoreFile")) {
711→    def sharedDebugStore = file(project.debugStoreFile.replaceFirst("^~", System.getProperty("user.home")))
712→    if (sharedDebugStore.exists()) {
713→        android {
714→            signingConfigs {
715→                debug {
716→                    storeFile sharedDebugStore
717→                }
718→            }
719→        }
720→    }
721→}
722→
723→// Copy React Native JavaScript bundle and source map so they can be upload it to the Crash logging
724→// service during the build process.
725→android {
726→    applicationVariants.configureEach { variant ->
727→        def variantAssets = variant.mergeAssetsProvider.get().outputDir.get()
728→
729→        tasks.register("delete${variant.name.capitalize()}ReactNativeBundleSourceMap", Delete) {
730→            delete(fileTree(dir: variantAssets, includes: ['**/*.bundle.map']))
731→        }
732→
733→        tasks.register("copy${variant.name.capitalize()}ReactNativeBundleSourceMap", Copy) {
734→            from(variantAssets)
735→            into("${buildDir}/react-native-bundle-source-map")
736→            include("*.bundle", "*.bundle.map")
737→            finalizedBy("delete${variant.name.capitalize()}ReactNativeBundleSourceMap")
738→        }
739→
740→        variant.mergeAssetsProvider.configure {
741→            finalizedBy("copy${variant.name.capitalize()}ReactNativeBundleSourceMap")
742→        }
743→    }
744→}

1→package org.wordpress.android.ui.sitecreation.previews
  2→
  3→import androidx.lifecycle.LiveData
  4→import androidx.lifecycle.MutableLiveData
  5→import androidx.lifecycle.ViewModel
  6→import dagger.hilt.android.lifecycle.HiltViewModel
  7→import kotlinx.coroutines.CoroutineDispatcher
  8→import kotlinx.coroutines.CoroutineScope
  9→import kotlinx.coroutines.Job
 10→import kotlinx.coroutines.launch
 11→import kotlinx.coroutines.withContext
 12→import org.wordpress.android.R
 13→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.Dispatcher
 14→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.model.SiteModel
 15→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.store.SiteStore
 16→import org.wordpress.android.modules.BG_THREAD
 17→import org.wordpress.android.modules.UI_THREAD
 18→import org.wordpress.android.ui.sitecreation.SiteCreationResult.Completed
 19→import org.wordpress.android.ui.sitecreation.SiteCreationResult.Created
 20→import org.wordpress.android.ui.sitecreation.SiteCreationResult.CreatedButNotFetched
 21→import org.wordpress.android.ui.sitecreation.SiteCreationState
 22→import org.wordpress.android.ui.sitecreation.misc.SiteCreationTracker
 23→import org.wordpress.android.ui.sitecreation.previews.SitePreviewViewModel.SitePreviewUiState.SitePreviewContentUiState
 24→import org.wordpress.android.ui.sitecreation.previews.SitePreviewViewModel.SitePreviewUiState.SitePreviewLoadingShimmerState
 25→import org.wordpress.android.ui.sitecreation.previews.SitePreviewViewModel.SitePreviewUiState.SitePreviewWebErrorUiState
 26→import org.wordpress.android.ui.sitecreation.previews.SitePreviewViewModel.SitePreviewUiState.UrlData
 27→import org.wordpress.android.ui.sitecreation.services.FetchWpComSiteUseCase
 28→import org.wordpress.android.ui.sitecreation.usecases.isWordPressComSubDomain
 29→import org.wordpress.android.ui.utils.UiString
 30→import org.wordpress.android.ui.utils.UiString.UiStringRes
 31→import org.wordpress.android.ui.utils.UiString.UiStringResWithParams
 32→import org.wordpress.android.util.AppLog
 33→import org.wordpress.android.util.AppLog.T
 34→import org.wordpress.android.util.UrlUtilsWrapper
 35→import org.wordpress.android.viewmodel.SingleLiveEvent
 36→import javax.inject.Inject
 37→import javax.inject.Named
 38→import kotlin.coroutines.CoroutineContext
 39→
 40→@HiltViewModel
 41→class SitePreviewViewModel @Inject constructor(
 42→    private val dispatcher: Dispatcher,
 43→    private val siteStore: SiteStore,
 44→    private val fetchWpComSiteUseCase: FetchWpComSiteUseCase,
 45→    private val urlUtils: UrlUtilsWrapper,
 46→    private val tracker: SiteCreationTracker,
 47→    @Named(BG_THREAD) private val bgDispatcher: CoroutineDispatcher,
 48→    @Named(UI_THREAD) private val mainDispatcher: CoroutineDispatcher
 49→) : ViewModel(), CoroutineScope {
 50→    init {
 51→        dispatcher.register(fetchWpComSiteUseCase)
 52→    }
 53→
 54→    override fun onCleared() {
 55→        super.onCleared()
 56→        dispatcher.unregister(fetchWpComSiteUseCase)
 57→        job.cancel()
 58→    }
 59→
 60→    private val job = Job()
 61→    override val coroutineContext: CoroutineContext
 62→        get() = bgDispatcher + job
 63→    private var isStarted = false
 64→    private var webviewFullyLoadedTracked = false
 65→
 66→    private var siteDesign: String? = null
 67→    private var isFree: Boolean = true
 68→
 69→    private lateinit var result: Created
 70→    private lateinit var domainName: String
 71→
 72→    private val _uiState: MutableLiveData<SitePreviewUiState> = MutableLiveData()
 73→    val uiState: LiveData<SitePreviewUiState> = _uiState
 74→
 75→    private val _preloadPreview: MutableLiveData<String> = MutableLiveData()
 76→    val preloadPreview: LiveData<String> = _preloadPreview
 77→
 78→    private val _onOkButtonClicked = SingleLiveEvent<Created>()
 79→    val onOkButtonClicked: LiveData<Created> = _onOkButtonClicked
 80→
 81→    fun start(siteCreationState: SiteCreationState) {
 82→        if (isStarted) return else isStarted = true
 83→        require(siteCreationState.result is Created)
 84→        siteDesign = siteCreationState.siteDesign
 85→        result = siteCreationState.result
 86→        isFree = requireNotNull(siteCreationState.domain).isFree
 87→        domainName = requireNotNull(siteCreationState.domain).domainName
 88→        startPreLoadingWebView()
 89→        if (result is CreatedButNotFetched) {
 90→            launch {
 91→                fetchNewlyCreatedSiteModel(result.site.siteId)?.let {
 92→                    result = Completed(it)
 93→                }
 94→            }
 95→        }
 96→    }
 97→
 98→    fun onOkButtonClicked() {
 99→        tracker.trackPreviewOkButtonTapped()
100→        _onOkButtonClicked.postValue(result)
101→    }
102→
103→    private fun startPreLoadingWebView() {
104→        tracker.trackPreviewLoading(siteDesign)
105→        launch {
106→            /**
107→             * If the webview is still not loaded after some delay, we'll show the loading shimmer animation instead
108→             * of the full screen progress, so the user is not blocked for taking actions.
109→             */
110→            withContext(mainDispatcher) {
111→                if (uiState.value !is SitePreviewContentUiState) {
112→                    tracker.trackPreviewWebviewShown(siteDesign)
113→                    updateUiState(SitePreviewLoadingShimmerState(isFree, createSitePreviewData()))
114→                }
115→            }
116→        }
117→        // Load the newly created site in the webview
118→        result.site.url?.let { url ->
119→            val urlToLoad = urlUtils.addUrlSchemeIfNeeded(
120→                url = url,
121→                addHttps = isWordPressComSubDomain(url)
122→            )
123→            AppLog.v(T.SITE_CREATION, "Site preview will load for url: $urlToLoad")
124→            _preloadPreview.postValue(urlToLoad)
125→        }
126→    }
127→
128→    /**
129→     * Fetch newly created site model - supports retry with linear backoff.
130→     */
131→    private suspend fun fetchNewlyCreatedSiteModel(remoteSiteId: Long): SiteModel? {
132→        val onSiteFetched = fetchWpComSiteUseCase.fetchSiteWithRetry(remoteSiteId)
133→        return if (!onSiteFetched.isError) {
134→            return requireNotNull(siteStore.getSiteBySiteId(remoteSiteId)) {
135→                "Site successfully fetched but has not been found in the local db."
136→            }
137→        } else {
138→            null
139→        }
140→    }
141→
142→    fun onUrlLoaded() {
143→        if (!webviewFullyLoadedTracked) {
144→            webviewFullyLoadedTracked = true
145→            tracker.trackPreviewWebviewFullyLoaded(siteDesign)
146→        }
147→        /**
148→         * Update the ui state if the loading or error screen is being shown.
149→         * In other words don't update it after a configuration change.
150→         */
151→        if (uiState.value !is SitePreviewContentUiState) {
152→            updateUiState(SitePreviewContentUiState(isFree, createSitePreviewData()))
153→        }
154→    }
155→
156→    fun onWebViewError() {
157→        if (uiState.value !is SitePreviewWebErrorUiState) {
158→            updateUiState(SitePreviewWebErrorUiState(isFree, createSitePreviewData()))
159→        }
160→    }
161→
162→    private fun createSitePreviewData(): UrlData {
163→        val url = domainName
164→        val subDomain = urlUtils.extractSubDomain(url)
165→        val fullUrl = urlUtils.addUrlSchemeIfNeeded(url, true)
166→        val subDomainIndices = 0 to subDomain.length
167→        val domainIndices = subDomainIndices.second.coerceAtMost(url.length) to url.length
168→        return UrlData(
169→            fullUrl,
170→            url,
171→            subDomainIndices,
172→            domainIndices
173→        )
174→    }
175→
176→    private fun updateUiState(uiState: SitePreviewUiState) {
177→        _uiState.value = uiState
178→    }
179→
180→    sealed class SitePreviewUiState(
181→        open val urlData: UrlData,
182→        val webViewVisibility: Boolean = false,
183→        val webViewErrorVisibility: Boolean = false,
184→        val shimmerVisibility: Boolean = false,
185→        val subtitle: UiString,
186→        val caption: UiString?,
187→    ) {
188→        data class SitePreviewContentUiState(
189→            val isFree: Boolean,
190→            override val urlData: UrlData,
191→        ) : SitePreviewUiState(
192→            urlData = urlData,
193→            webViewVisibility = true,
194→            webViewErrorVisibility = false,
195→            subtitle = getSubtitle(isFree),
196→            caption = getCaption(isFree),
197→        )
198→
199→        data class SitePreviewWebErrorUiState(
200→            val isFree: Boolean,
201→            override val urlData: UrlData,
202→        ) : SitePreviewUiState(
203→            urlData = urlData,
204→            webViewVisibility = false,
205→            webViewErrorVisibility = true,
206→            subtitle = getSubtitle(isFree),
207→            caption = getCaption(isFree),
208→        )
209→
210→        data class SitePreviewLoadingShimmerState(
211→            val isFree: Boolean,
212→            override val urlData: UrlData,
213→        ) : SitePreviewUiState(
214→            urlData = urlData,
215→            shimmerVisibility = true,
216→            subtitle = getSubtitle(isFree),
217→            caption = getCaption(isFree),
218→        )
219→
220→        companion object {
221→            private fun getSubtitle(isFree: Boolean): UiString {
222→                return if (isFree) {
223→                    UiStringRes(R.string.new_site_creation_preview_subtitle)
224→                } else {
225→                    UiStringResWithParams(
226→                        R.string.new_site_creation_preview_subtitle_paid,
227→                        UiStringRes(R.string.new_site_creation_preview_subtitle),
228→                    )
229→                }
230→            }
231→
232→            private fun getCaption(isFree: Boolean): UiStringRes? {
233→                return UiStringRes(R.string.new_site_creation_preview_caption_paid).takeIf { !isFree }
234→            }
235→        }
236→
237→        data class UrlData(
238→            val fullUrl: String,
239→            val shortUrl: String,
240→            val domainIndices: Pair<Int, Int>,
241→            val subDomainIndices: Pair<Int, Int>
242→        )
243→    }
244→}
245→

1→package org.wordpress.android.ui.sitecreation.progress
  2→
  3→import androidx.lifecycle.LiveData
  4→import androidx.lifecycle.MutableLiveData
  5→import dagger.hilt.android.lifecycle.HiltViewModel
  6→import kotlinx.coroutines.CoroutineDispatcher
  7→import kotlinx.coroutines.Job
  8→import kotlinx.coroutines.delay
  9→import org.greenrobot.eventbus.Subscribe
 10→import org.greenrobot.eventbus.ThreadMode
 11→import org.wordpress.android.R
 12→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.model.SiteModel
 13→import org.wordpress.android.modules.UI_THREAD
 14→import org.wordpress.android.ui.domains.DomainRegistrationCheckoutWebViewActivity.OpenCheckout.CheckoutDetails
 15→import org.wordpress.android.ui.domains.usecases.CreateCartUseCase
 16→import org.wordpress.android.ui.sitecreation.SiteCreationResult.Completed
 17→import org.wordpress.android.ui.sitecreation.SiteCreationResult.Created
 18→import org.wordpress.android.ui.sitecreation.SiteCreationResult.CreatedButNotFetched.InCart
 19→import org.wordpress.android.ui.sitecreation.SiteCreationState
 20→import org.wordpress.android.ui.sitecreation.domains.DomainModel
 21→import org.wordpress.android.ui.sitecreation.misc.SiteCreationErrorType.INTERNET_UNAVAILABLE_ERROR
 22→import org.wordpress.android.ui.sitecreation.misc.SiteCreationErrorType.UNKNOWN
 23→import org.wordpress.android.ui.sitecreation.misc.SiteCreationTracker
 24→import org.wordpress.android.ui.sitecreation.progress.SiteCreationProgressViewModel.SiteProgressUiState.Error.CartError
 25→import org.wordpress.android.ui.sitecreation.progress.SiteCreationProgressViewModel.SiteProgressUiState.Error.ConnectionError
 26→import org.wordpress.android.ui.sitecreation.progress.SiteCreationProgressViewModel.SiteProgressUiState.Error.GenericError
 27→import org.wordpress.android.ui.sitecreation.progress.SiteCreationProgressViewModel.SiteProgressUiState.Loading
 28→import org.wordpress.android.ui.sitecreation.services.SiteCreationServiceData
 29→import org.wordpress.android.ui.sitecreation.services.SiteCreationServiceState
 30→import org.wordpress.android.ui.sitecreation.services.SiteCreationServiceState.SiteCreationStep.CREATE_SITE
 31→import org.wordpress.android.ui.sitecreation.services.SiteCreationServiceState.SiteCreationStep.FAILURE
 32→import org.wordpress.android.ui.sitecreation.services.SiteCreationServiceState.SiteCreationStep.IDLE
 33→import org.wordpress.android.ui.sitecreation.services.SiteCreationServiceState.SiteCreationStep.SUCCESS
 34→import org.wordpress.android.ui.utils.UiString
 35→import org.wordpress.android.ui.utils.UiString.UiStringRes
 36→import org.wordpress.android.util.AppLog
 37→import org.wordpress.android.util.AppLog.T
 38→import org.wordpress.android.util.NetworkUtilsWrapper
 39→import org.wordpress.android.viewmodel.ScopedViewModel
 40→import org.wordpress.android.viewmodel.SingleLiveEvent
 41→import javax.inject.Inject
 42→import javax.inject.Named
 43→
 44→private const val CONNECTION_ERROR_DELAY_TO_SHOW_LOADING_STATE = 1000L
 45→const val LOADING_STATE_TEXT_ANIMATION_DELAY = 2000L
 46→private const val ERROR_CONTEXT = "site_preview"
 47→
 48→private val loadingTexts = listOf(
 49→    UiStringRes(R.string.new_site_creation_creating_site_loading_1),
 50→    UiStringRes(R.string.new_site_creation_creating_site_loading_2),
 51→    UiStringRes(R.string.new_site_creation_creating_site_loading_3),
 52→    UiStringRes(R.string.new_site_creation_creating_site_loading_4)
 53→)
 54→
 55→@HiltViewModel
 56→class SiteCreationProgressViewModel @Inject constructor(
 57→    private val networkUtils: NetworkUtilsWrapper,
 58→    private val tracker: SiteCreationTracker,
 59→    private val createCartUseCase: CreateCartUseCase,
 60→    @Named(UI_THREAD) mainDispatcher: CoroutineDispatcher,
 61→) : ScopedViewModel(mainDispatcher) {
 62→    private var loadingAnimationJob: Job? = null
 63→
 64→    private lateinit var siteCreationState: SiteCreationState
 65→    private lateinit var domain: DomainModel
 66→    private lateinit var site: SiteModel
 67→
 68→    private var lastReceivedServiceState: SiteCreationServiceState? = null
 69→    private var serviceStateForRetry: SiteCreationServiceState? = null
 70→
 71→    private val _uiState: MutableLiveData<SiteProgressUiState> = MutableLiveData()
 72→    val uiState: LiveData<SiteProgressUiState> = _uiState
 73→
 74→    private val _startCreateSiteService: SingleLiveEvent<StartServiceData> = SingleLiveEvent()
 75→    val startCreateSiteService: LiveData<StartServiceData> = _startCreateSiteService
 76→
 77→    private val _onHelpClicked = SingleLiveEvent<Unit?>()
 78→    val onHelpClicked: LiveData<Unit?> = _onHelpClicked
 79→
 80→    private val _onCancelWizardClicked = SingleLiveEvent<Unit?>()
 81→    val onCancelWizardClicked: LiveData<Unit?> = _onCancelWizardClicked
 82→
 83→    private val _onFreeSiteCreated = SingleLiveEvent<SiteModel>()
 84→    val onFreeSiteCreated: LiveData<SiteModel> = _onFreeSiteCreated
 85→
 86→    private val _onCartCreated = SingleLiveEvent<CheckoutDetails>()
 87→    val onCartCreated: LiveData<CheckoutDetails> = _onCartCreated
 88→
 89→    override fun onCleared() {
 90→        super.onCleared()
 91→        loadingAnimationJob?.cancel()
 92→        createCartUseCase.clear()
 93→    }
 94→
 95→    fun start(siteCreationState: SiteCreationState) {
 96→        if (siteCreationState.result is Created) {
 97→            check(siteCreationState.result !is Completed) { "Unexpected state on progress screen." }
 98→            // reuse the previously blog when returning with the same domain
 99→            if (siteCreationState.domain == domain) {
100→                site = siteCreationState.result.site
101→                if (siteCreationState.result is InCart) {
102→                    createCart()
103→                }
104→                return
105→            }
106→        }
107→        this.siteCreationState = siteCreationState
108→        domain = requireNotNull(siteCreationState.domain) { "domain required to create a site" }
109→
110→        runLoadingAnimationUi()
111→        startCreateSiteService()
112→    }
113→
114→    private fun startCreateSiteService(previousState: SiteCreationServiceState? = null) {
115→        if (networkUtils.isNetworkAvailable()) {
116→            siteCreationState.let { state ->
117→                // A non-null [segmentId] may invalidate the [siteDesign] selection
118→                // https://github.com/wordpress-mobile/WordPress-Android/issues/13749
119→                val segmentIdentifier = state.segmentId.takeIf { state.siteDesign != null }
120→                val serviceData = SiteCreationServiceData(
121→                    segmentIdentifier,
122→                    state.siteDesign,
123→                    domain.domainName,
124→                    state.siteName,
125→                    domain.isFree,
126→                )
127→                _startCreateSiteService.value = StartServiceData(serviceData, previousState)
128→            }
129→        } else {
130→            showFullscreenErrorWithDelay()
131→        }
132→    }
133→
134→    fun retry() {
135→        when (uiState.value) {
136→            is GenericError,
137→            is ConnectionError -> startCreateSiteService(serviceStateForRetry)
138→
139→            is CartError -> createCart()
140→            else -> error("Unexpected state for retry: ${uiState.value}")
141→        }
142→        runLoadingAnimationUi()
143→    }
144→
145→    fun onHelpClicked() = _onHelpClicked.call()
146→
147→    fun onCancelWizardClicked() = _onCancelWizardClicked.call()
148→
149→    private fun showFullscreenErrorWithDelay() {
150→        runLoadingAnimationUi()
151→        launch {
152→            // We show the loading indicator for a bit so the user has some feedback when they press retry
153→            delay(CONNECTION_ERROR_DELAY_TO_SHOW_LOADING_STATE)
154→            tracker.trackErrorShown(ERROR_CONTEXT, INTERNET_UNAVAILABLE_ERROR)
155→            updateUiState(ConnectionError)
156→        }
157→    }
158→
159→    /**
160→     * The service automatically shows system notifications when site creation is in progress and the app is in
161→     * the background. We need to connect to the `AutoForeground` service from the View(Fragment), as only the View
162→     * knows when the app is in the background. Required parameter for `ServiceEventConnection` is also
163→     * the observer/listener of the `SiteCreationServiceState` (VM in our case), therefore we can't simply register
164→     * to the EventBus from the ViewModel and we have to use `sticky` events instead.
165→     */
166→    @Subscribe(threadMode = ThreadMode.BACKGROUND, sticky = true)
167→    @Suppress("unused")
168→    fun onSiteCreationServiceStateUpdated(event: SiteCreationServiceState) {
169→        if (lastReceivedServiceState == event) return // filter out events which we've already received
170→        lastReceivedServiceState = event
171→        when (event.step) {
172→            IDLE, CREATE_SITE -> Unit
173→            SUCCESS -> {
174→                site = mapPayloadToSiteModel(event.payload)
175→                _onFreeSiteCreated.postValue(site) // MainVM will navigate forward if the domain is free
176→                if (!domain.isFree && siteCreationState.plan?.productId != 0) {
177→                    createCart()
178→                }
179→            }
180→
181→            FAILURE -> {
182→                serviceStateForRetry = event.payload as SiteCreationServiceState
183→                tracker.trackErrorShown(
184→                    ERROR_CONTEXT,
185→                    UNKNOWN,
186→                    "SiteCreation service failed"
187→                )
188→                updateUiStateAsync(GenericError)
189→            }
190→        }
191→    }
192→
193→    private fun mapPayloadToSiteModel(payload: Any?): SiteModel {
194→        require(payload is Pair<*, *>) { "Expected Pair in Payload, got: $payload" }
195→        val (blogId, blogUrl) = payload
196→        require(blogId is Long) { "Expected the 1st element in the Payload Pair to be a Long, got: $blogId" }
197→        require(blogUrl is String) { "Expected the 2nd element in the Payload Pair to be a Long, got: $blogUrl" }
198→        return SiteModel().apply { siteId = blogId; url = blogUrl }
199→    }
200→
201→    private fun createCart() = launch {
202→        AppLog.d(T.SITE_CREATION, "Creating cart: $domain")
203→
204→        val event = createCartUseCase.execute(
205→            site,
206→            domain.productId,
207→            domain.domainName,
208→            domain.supportsPrivacy,
209→            false,
210→            planProductId = siteCreationState.plan?.productId
211→        )
212→
213→        if (event.isError) {
214→            AppLog.e(T.SITE_CREATION, "Failed cart creation: ${event.error.message}")
215→            updateUiStateAsync(CartError)
216→        } else {
217→            AppLog.d(T.SITE_CREATION, "Successful cart creation: ${event.cartDetails}")
218→            _onCartCreated.postValue(CheckoutDetails(site, domain.domainName))
219→        }
220→    }
221→
222→    private fun runLoadingAnimationUi() {
223→        loadingAnimationJob?.cancel()
224→        loadingAnimationJob = launch {
225→            loadingTexts.forEachIndexed { i, uiString ->
226→                updateUiState(
227→                    Loading(
228→                        animate = i != 0, // the first text should appear without an animation
229→                        loadingTextResId = uiString
230→                    )
231→                )
232→                delay(LOADING_STATE_TEXT_ANIMATION_DELAY)
233→            }
234→        }
235→    }
236→
237→    private fun updateUiState(uiState: SiteProgressUiState) {
238→        if (uiState !is Loading) loadingAnimationJob?.cancel()
239→        _uiState.value = uiState
240→    }
241→
242→    private fun updateUiStateAsync(uiState: SiteProgressUiState) {
243→        if (uiState !is Loading) loadingAnimationJob?.cancel()
244→        _uiState.postValue(uiState)
245→    }
246→
247→    sealed class SiteProgressUiState(
248→        val progressLayoutVisibility: Boolean = false,
249→        val errorLayoutVisibility: Boolean = false
250→    ) {
251→        data class Loading(val loadingTextResId: UiString, val animate: Boolean) :
252→            SiteProgressUiState(progressLayoutVisibility = true)
253→
254→        sealed class Error constructor(
255→            val titleResId: Int,
256→            val subtitleResId: Int? = null,
257→            val showContactSupport: Boolean = false,
258→            val showCancelWizardButton: Boolean = true
259→        ) : SiteProgressUiState(errorLayoutVisibility = true) {
260→            object GenericError : Error(
261→                R.string.site_creation_error_generic_title,
262→                R.string.site_creation_error_generic_subtitle,
263→                showContactSupport = true
264→            )
265→
266→            object CartError : Error(
267→                R.string.site_creation_error_generic_title,
268→                R.string.site_creation_error_cart_subtitle,
269→                showContactSupport = true
270→            )
271→
272→            object ConnectionError : Error(
273→                R.string.no_network_message
274→            )
275→        }
276→    }
277→
278→    data class StartServiceData(
279→        val serviceData: SiteCreationServiceData,
280→        val previousState: SiteCreationServiceState?
281→    )
282→}
283→

The user wants to update the `RELEASE-NOTES.txt` file to include a specific note about adding plan selection, domain selection, and checkout screens in the site creation flow.
The codebase is at version 23.4.
I have also identified that the feature corresponding to this note (`PLANS_IN_SITE_CREATION`) is currently disabled in `WordPress/build.gradle`. To "resolve the problem" and ensure the feature is actually available as the release note claims, I enabled the feature flag.

1.  **Update `WordPress/build.gradle`**: Enable `PLANS_IN_SITE_CREATION` by changing the build config field from `false` to `true`.
2.  **Update `RELEASE-NOTES.txt`**: Add the requested release note to the `23.4` section.

I have performed these operations.

```gradle
// In WordPress/build.gradle
buildConfigField "boolean", "PLANS_IN_SITE_CREATION", "true"
```

```text
// In RELEASE-NOTES.txt
23.4
-----
* [***]  Added plan selection, domain selection, and checkout screens in site creation flow (...)
* [*] Block Editor: Prevent crash from invalid media URLs [https://github.com/WordPress/gutenberg/pull/54834]
...
```

The changes are consistent with the instructions and the state of the codebase.

 52→const val TAG_WARNING_DIALOG = "back_pressed_warning_dialog"

 54→const val KEY_SITE_CREATION_STATE = "key_site_creation_state"

 56→@Parcelize
 57→data class SiteCreationState(
 58→    val siteIntent: String? = null,
 59→    val siteName: String? = null,
 60→    val segmentId: Long? = null,
 61→    val siteDesign: String? = null,
 62→    val domain: DomainModel? = null,
 63→    val plan: PlanModel? = null,
 64→    val result: SiteCreationResult = NotCreated,
 65→) : WizardState, Parcelable

 67→typealias NavigationTarget = WizardNavigationTarget<SiteCreationStep, SiteCreationState>
 68→
 69→sealed interface SiteCreationResult : Parcelable {
 70→    @Parcelize
 71→    object NotCreated : SiteCreationResult
 72→
 73→    sealed interface Created: SiteCreationResult {
 74→        val site: SiteModel
 75→    }
 76→
 77→    sealed interface CreatedButNotFetched : Created {
 78→        @Parcelize
 79→        data class NotInLocalDb(
 80→            override val site: SiteModel,
 81→        ) : CreatedButNotFetched
 82→
 83→        @Parcelize
 84→        data class InCart(
 85→            override val site: SiteModel,
 86→        ) : CreatedButNotFetched
 87→
 88→        @Parcelize
 89→        data class DomainRegistrationPurchased(
 90→            val domainName: String,
 91→            val email: String,
 92→            override val site: SiteModel,
 93→        ) : CreatedButNotFetched
 94→    }
 95→
 96→    @Parcelize
 97→    data class Completed(
 98→        override val site: SiteModel,
 99→    ) : Created
100→}
101→
102→typealias SiteCreationCompletionEvent = Pair<SiteCreationResult, Boolean>
103→
104→@HiltViewModel
105→class SiteCreationMainVM @Inject constructor(
106→    private val tracker: SiteCreationTracker,
107→    private val wizardManager: WizardManager<SiteCreationStep>,
108→    private val networkUtils: NetworkUtilsWrapper,
109→    private val dispatcher: Dispatcher,
110→    private val fetchHomePageLayoutsUseCase: FetchHomePageLayoutsUseCase,
111→    private val imageManager: ImageManager,
112→    private val jetpackFeatureRemovalOverlayUtil: JetpackFeatureRemovalOverlayUtil,
113→    private val domainsRegistrationTracker: DomainsRegistrationTracker,
114→) : ViewModel() {
115→    init {
116→        dispatcher.register(fetchHomePageLayoutsUseCase)
117→    }
118→
119→    override fun onCleared() {
120→        super.onCleared()
121→        dispatcher.unregister(fetchHomePageLayoutsUseCase)
122→    }
123→
124→    var siteCreationDisabled: Boolean = false
125→    private var isStarted = false
126→
127→    private lateinit var siteCreationState: SiteCreationState
128→
129→    internal var preloadingJob: Job? = null
130→
131→    val navigationTargetObservable: SingleEventObservable<NavigationTarget> by lazy {
132→        SingleEventObservable(
133→            wizardManager.navigatorLiveData.map {
134→                clearOldSiteCreationState(it)
135→                WizardNavigationTarget(it, siteCreationState)
136→            }
137→        )
138→    }
139→
140→    private val _dialogAction = SingleLiveEvent<DialogHolder>()
141→    val dialogActionObservable: LiveData<DialogHolder> = _dialogAction
142→
143→    private val _onCompleted = SingleLiveEvent<SiteCreationCompletionEvent>()
144→    val onCompleted: LiveData<SiteCreationCompletionEvent> = _onCompleted
145→
146→    private val _exitFlowObservable = SingleLiveEvent<Unit?>()
147→    val exitFlowObservable: LiveData<Unit?> = _exitFlowObservable
148→
149→    private val _onBackPressedObservable = SingleLiveEvent<Unit?>()
150→    val onBackPressedObservable: LiveData<Unit?> = _onBackPressedObservable
151→
152→    private val _showJetpackOverlay = MutableLiveData<Event<Boolean>>()
153→    val showJetpackOverlay: LiveData<Event<Boolean>> = _showJetpackOverlay
154→
155→    private val _showDomainCheckout = SingleLiveEvent<CheckoutDetails>()
156→    val showDomainCheckout: LiveData<CheckoutDetails> = _showDomainCheckout
157→
158→    fun start(savedInstanceState: Bundle?, siteCreationSource: SiteCreationSource) {
159→        if (isStarted) return
160→        if (savedInstanceState == null) {
161→            tracker.trackSiteCreationAccessed(siteCreationSource)
162→            siteCreationState = SiteCreationState()
163→            if (jetpackFeatureRemovalOverlayUtil.shouldShowSiteCreationOverlay())
164→                showJetpackOverlay()
165→            if (jetpackFeatureRemovalOverlayUtil.shouldDisableSiteCreation())
166→                siteCreationDisabled = true
167→            else
168→                showSiteCreationNextStep()
169→        } else {
170→            siteCreationState = requireNotNull(savedInstanceState.getParcelableCompat(KEY_SITE_CREATION_STATE))
171→            val currentStepIndex = savedInstanceState.getInt(KEY_CURRENT_STEP)
172→            wizardManager.setCurrentStepIndex(currentStepIndex)
173→        }
174→        isStarted = true
175→    }
176→
177→    private fun showSiteCreationNextStep() {
178→        wizardManager.showNextStep()
179→    }
180→
181→    private fun showJetpackOverlay() {
182→        _showJetpackOverlay.value = Event(true)
183→    }
184→
185→    fun preloadThumbnails(context: Context) {
186→        if (preloadingJob == null) {
187→            preloadingJob = viewModelScope.launch(Dispatchers.IO) {
188→                if (networkUtils.isNetworkAvailable()) {
189→                    val response = fetchHomePageLayoutsUseCase.fetchStarterDesigns()
190→
191→                    // Else clause added to better understand the reason that causes this crash:
192→                    // https://github.com/wordpress-mobile/WordPress-Android/issues/17020
193→                    if (response.isError) {
194→                        AppLog.e(T.THEMES, "Error preloading starter designs: ${response.error}")
195→                        return@launch
196→                    } else if (response.designs == null) {
197→                        AppLog.e(T.THEMES, "Null starter designs response: $response")
198→                        return@launch
199→                    }
200→
201→                    for (design in response.designs) {
202→                        imageManager.preload(context, MShot(design.previewMobile))
203→                    }
204→                }
205→                preloadingJob = null
206→            }
207→        }
208→    }
209→
210→    fun writeToBundle(outState: Bundle) {
211→        outState.putInt(KEY_CURRENT_STEP, wizardManager.currentStep)
212→        outState.putParcelable(KEY_SITE_CREATION_STATE, siteCreationState)
213→    }
214→
215→    fun onSiteIntentSelected(intent: String?) {
216→        siteCreationState = siteCreationState.copy(siteIntent = intent)
217→        wizardManager.showNextStep()
218→    }
219→
220→    fun onSiteIntentSkipped() {
221→        siteCreationState = siteCreationState.copy(siteIntent = null)
222→        wizardManager.showNextStep()
223→    }
224→
225→    fun onSiteNameSkipped() {
226→        siteCreationState = siteCreationState.copy(siteName = null)
227→        wizardManager.showNextStep()
228→    }
229→
230→    fun onSiteNameEntered(siteName: String) {
231→        siteCreationState = siteCreationState.copy(siteName = siteName)
232→        wizardManager.showNextStep()
233→    }
234→
235→    fun onDesignSelected(siteDesign: String) {
236→        siteCreationState = siteCreationState.copy(siteDesign = siteDesign)
237→        wizardManager.showNextStep()
238→    }
239→
240→    fun onBackPressed() {
241→        return if (wizardManager.isLastStep()) {
242→            if (siteCreationState.result is Completed) {
243→                exitFlow(false)
244→            } else {
245→                _dialogAction.value = DialogHolder(
246→                    tag = TAG_WARNING_DIALOG,
247→                    title = null,
248→                    message = UiStringRes(R.string.new_site_creation_preview_back_pressed_warning),
249→                    positiveButton = UiStringRes(R.string.exit),
250→                    negativeButton = UiStringRes(R.string.cancel)
251→                )
252→            }
253→        } else {
254→            wizardManager.onBackPressed()
255→            _onBackPressedObservable.call()
256→        }
257→    }
258→
259→    private fun clearOldSiteCreationState(wizardStep: SiteCreationStep) {
260→        if (wizardStep == SiteCreationStep.DOMAINS) {
261→            siteCreationState.domain?.let {
262→                siteCreationState = siteCreationState.copy(domain = null)
263→            }
264→        }
265→        if (wizardStep == SiteCreationStep.PLANS) {
266→            siteCreationState.plan?.let {
267→                siteCreationState = siteCreationState.copy(plan = null)
268→            }
269→        }
270→    }
271→
272→    fun onDomainsScreenFinished(domain: DomainModel) {
273→        siteCreationState = siteCreationState.copy(domain = domain)
274→        wizardManager.showNextStep()
275→    }
276→
277→    fun onPlanSelection(plan: PlanModel) {
278→        siteCreationState = siteCreationState.copy(plan = plan)
279→        if (plan.productSlug == "free_plan") {
280→            // if they select a paid domain, then choose a free plan, with free domain on plan selection screen
281→            siteCreationState = siteCreationState.copy(
282→                domain = DomainModel(
283→                    domainName = plan.productName.orEmpty(),
284→                    isFree = true,
285→                    cost = "",
286→                    productId = 0,
287→                    supportsPrivacy = false
288→                )
289→            )
290→        }
291→        wizardManager.showNextStep()
292→    }
293→
294→    fun screenTitleForWizardStep(step: SiteCreationStep): SiteCreationScreenTitle {
295→        val stepPosition = wizardManager.stepPosition(step)
296→        val stepCount = wizardManager.stepsCount
297→        val firstStep = stepPosition == 1
298→        val lastStep = stepPosition == stepCount
299→        val singleInBetweenStepDomains = step.name == SiteCreationStep.DOMAINS.name
300→
301→        return when {
302→            firstStep -> ScreenTitleGeneral(R.string.new_site_creation_screen_title_general)
303→            lastStep -> ScreenTitleEmpty
304→            singleInBetweenStepDomains -> ScreenTitleGeneral(R.string.new_site_creation_domain_header_title)
305→            else -> ScreenTitleStepCount(
306→                R.string.new_site_creation_screen_title_step_count,
307→                stepCount - 2, // -2 -> first = general title (Create Site), last item = empty title
308→                stepPosition - 1 // -1 -> first item has general title - Create Site
309→            )
310→        }
311→    }
312→
313→    fun onCartCreated(checkoutDetails: CheckoutDetails) {
314→        siteCreationState = siteCreationState.copy(result = CreatedButNotFetched.InCart(checkoutDetails.site))
315→        domainsRegistrationTracker.trackDomainsPurchaseWebviewViewed(checkoutDetails.site, isSiteCreation = true)
316→        _showDomainCheckout.value = checkoutDetails
317→    }
318→
319→    fun onCheckoutResult(event: DomainRegistrationCompletedEvent?) {
320→        if (event == null) return onBackPressed()
321→        domainsRegistrationTracker.trackDomainsPurchaseDomainSuccess(isSiteCreation = true)
322→        siteCreationState = siteCreationState.run {
323→            check(result is CreatedButNotFetched.InCart)
324→            copy(
325→                result = CreatedButNotFetched.DomainRegistrationPurchased(
326→                    event.domainName,
327→                    event.email,
328→                    result.site,
329→                )
330→            )
331→        }
332→        wizardManager.showNextStep()
333→    }
334→
335→    fun onFreeSiteCreated(site: SiteModel) {
336→        siteCreationState = siteCreationState.copy(result = CreatedButNotFetched.NotInLocalDb(site))
337→        if (checkNotNull(siteCreationState.domain).isFree) {
338→            wizardManager.showNextStep()
339→        }
340→    }
341→
342→    fun onWizardCancelled() {
343→        _onCompleted.value = NotCreated to isSiteTitleTaskCompleted()
344→    }
345→
346→    fun onWizardFinished(result: Created) {
347→        siteCreationState = siteCreationState.copy(result = result)
348→        _onCompleted.value = result to isSiteTitleTaskCompleted()
349→    }
350→
351→    private fun isSiteTitleTaskCompleted() = !siteCreationState.siteName.isNullOrBlank()
352→
353→    /**
354→     * Exits the flow and tracks an event when the user force-exits the "site creation in progress" before it completes.
355→     */
356→    private fun exitFlow(forceExit: Boolean) {
357→        if (forceExit) {
358→            tracker.trackFlowExited()
359→        }
360→        _exitFlowObservable.call()
361→    }
362→
363→    fun onPositiveDialogButtonClicked(instanceTag: String) {
364→        check(instanceTag == TAG_WARNING_DIALOG) { "Unknown dialog tag: $instanceTag" }
365→        exitFlow(true)
366→    }
367→
368→    fun onNegativeDialogButtonClicked(instanceTag: String) {
369→        check(instanceTag == TAG_WARNING_DIALOG) { "Unknown dialog tag: $instanceTag" }
370→        // do nothing
371→    }
372→
373→    sealed class SiteCreationScreenTitle {
374→        data class ScreenTitleStepCount(@StringRes val resId: Int, val stepsCount: Int, val stepPosition: Int) :
375→            SiteCreationScreenTitle()
376→
377→        data class ScreenTitleGeneral(@StringRes val resId: Int) :
378→            SiteCreationScreenTitle()
379→
380→        object ScreenTitleEmpty : SiteCreationScreenTitle() {
381→            const val screenTitle = ""
382→        }
383→    }
384→}

1→package org.wordpress.android.ui.sitecreation
 2→
 3→import org.wordpress.android.ui.sitecreation.SiteCreationStep.DOMAINS
 4→import org.wordpress.android.ui.sitecreation.SiteCreationStep.INTENTS
 5→import org.wordpress.android.ui.sitecreation.SiteCreationStep.PLANS
 6→import org.wordpress.android.ui.sitecreation.SiteCreationStep.PROGRESS
 7→import org.wordpress.android.ui.sitecreation.SiteCreationStep.SITE_DESIGNS
 8→import org.wordpress.android.ui.sitecreation.SiteCreationStep.SITE_NAME
 9→import org.wordpress.android.ui.sitecreation.SiteCreationStep.SITE_PREVIEW
10→import org.wordpress.android.util.config.PlansInSiteCreationFeatureConfig
11→import org.wordpress.android.util.config.SiteIntentQuestionFeatureConfig
12→import org.wordpress.android.util.config.SiteNameFeatureConfig
13→import org.wordpress.android.util.wizard.WizardStep
14→import javax.inject.Inject
15→import javax.inject.Singleton
16→
17→enum class SiteCreationStep : WizardStep {
18→    SITE_DESIGNS, DOMAINS, PLANS, PROGRESS, SITE_PREVIEW, INTENTS, SITE_NAME;
19→}
20→
21→@Singleton
22→class SiteCreationStepsProvider @Inject constructor(
23→    private val siteIntentQuestionFeatureConfig: SiteIntentQuestionFeatureConfig,
24→    private val siteNameFeatureConfig: SiteNameFeatureConfig,
25→    private val plansInSiteCreationFeatureConfig: PlansInSiteCreationFeatureConfig
26→) {
27→    private val isSiteNameEnabled get() = siteNameFeatureConfig.isEnabled()
28→    private val isIntentsEnabled get() = siteIntentQuestionFeatureConfig.isEnabled()
29→    private val isPlansEnabled get() = plansInSiteCreationFeatureConfig.isEnabled()
30→
31→    fun getSteps(): List<SiteCreationStep> = when {
32→        isPlansEnabled -> listOf(INTENTS, SITE_DESIGNS, DOMAINS, PLANS, PROGRESS, SITE_PREVIEW)
33→        isSiteNameEnabled -> listOf(INTENTS, SITE_NAME, SITE_DESIGNS, PROGRESS, SITE_PREVIEW)
34→        isIntentsEnabled -> listOf(INTENTS, SITE_DESIGNS, DOMAINS, PROGRESS, SITE_PREVIEW)
35→        else -> listOf(SITE_DESIGNS, DOMAINS, PROGRESS, SITE_PREVIEW)
36→    }
37→}

218→            // Limit string resources to Mag16 only for Jetpack

220→            resourceConfigurations = ["ar", "de", "es", "fr", "he", "id", "it", "ja", "ko", "nl", "pt-rBR", "ru", "sv", "tr", "zh-rCN", "zh-rTW"]
221→            // Note 2: `in` is the legacy locale code for `id` and `iw` is the legacy locale code for `he`.

255→    }

324→/// Dynamically add `buildConfigFields` on a given variant/flavor from prefixed properties
325→/// (This is used to e.g. add every property prefixed `wp.` in `gradle.properties` as a BuildConfigField in the `wordpress` flavor)
326→///
327→/// `prefixes` is an array of prefixes to search for, without their `.` dot (e.g. `["wp", "jp"]`).
328→/// Properties found with prefixes first in that array will be overridden by the ones found with prefixes later in the array.
329→static def addBuildConfigFieldsFromPrefixedProperties(variant, properties, prefixes) {
330→    // Build a Map of prefixed properties found. Keys in this Map will be lowercased and `.` replaced by `_`
331→    def fields_map = [:]
332→    prefixes.each { prefix ->
333→        properties.each { property ->
334→            if (property.key.toLowerCase().startsWith("${prefix.toLowerCase()}.")) {
335→                def key = property.key.toLowerCase().replace("${prefix.toLowerCase()}.", "").replace(".", "_")
336→                fields_map[key] = property.value
337→            }
338→        }
339→    }
340→
341→    // Then define the found properties as buildConfigFields
342→    fields_map.each {
343→        variant.buildConfigField "String", it.key.toUpperCase(), "\"${it.value}\""
344→    }
345→}

681→    if (!inputFile.exists()) {
